title: Winning Consistency
description: No more guessing. GitSet provides RC racers a standardized way to document winning setups. By tracking every tweak, you can easily revert to winning configurations or adapt quickly to changing track conditions.

title: Portable Pit Data
description: Carry your setup as a lightweight text file. Just upload, view, and adjust—anytime, anywhere. No bulky software or unreliable cloud apps needed at the pit area.

title: Encrypted Privacy
description: Winning setups are trade secrets. GitSet keeps your data entirely client-side with Base64 encryption. No servers, no tracking—just pure performance stored right in your pocket.
